title: Benefit Street Partners Launches Multi-Strategy Interval Fund, Franklin BSP Private Credit Fund
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Benefit Street Partners L.L.C (“BSP”) and its parent company Franklin Templeton today announced the launch of Franklin BSP Private Credit Fund (FBSPX). The fund takes a multi-strategy approach to investing in US middle market private credit, seeking to generate strong current income and superior risk-adjusted returns across market cycles. title: Add To Your Passive Income With These Stocks
text: We discuss five dividend growth stocks with high yields that are undervalued. The stocks are all yielding over 5% with good dividend safety. Also, they are trading at a low price-to-earnings ratio relative to their 5-year or 10-year ranges.

title: 2 Financial Stocks to Buy Before the Bear Market Is Over
